overview.description: The TrueShares Quarterly Bull Hedge ETF (QBUL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF that aims for growth and capital preservation in the event of decline in the US equity market space. The fund invests in short-term income generating debt securities and short-term call options of large-cap US securities. QBUL was launched on Jun 28, 2024 and is issued by Truemark Group.
